question_text: A wooden block is placed on a wooden table. Which of the following would most reduce the friction between the block and the table?

options.label: A
options.text: Increasing the weight of the block

options.label: B
options.text: Applying oil or grease between the surfaces

options.label: D
options.text: Pushing the block faster across the table

correct_answer: B) Applying oil or grease between the surfaces
explanation: Lubrication with oil or grease reduces friction by creating a slippery layer between surfaces. Increasing weight, rougher surfaces and speed do not reduce friction and may increase it.
